mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_TRATE (ID, START_TIME, END_TIME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '10', #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM
TRATE_ID = #{trateId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_TIERED_RATE = #{isTieredRate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PREFERENTIAL_RATE = #{preferentialRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER = #{originAccNumber, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
IMP_EXP = #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM WHERE ID IN
#{trateItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(0) FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR WHERE TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID IN (SELECT TBTI.ID FROM T_BUS_TRATE TBT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM TBTI ON TBT.ID = TBTI.TRATE_ID WHERE TBT.ID = #{trateId,jdbcType=BIGINT})

SELECT TBT.ID TBT_ID, TBT.START_TIME TBT_START_TIME, TBT.END_TIME TBT_END_TIME, TBT.CREATE_BY TBT_CREATE_BY, TBT.CREATE_BY_NAME TBT_CREATE_BY_NAME, TBT.CREATE_TIME TBT_CREATE_TIME, TBT.UPDATE_BY TBT_UPDATE_BY, TBT.UPDATE_BY_NAME TBT_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBT.UPDATE_TIME TBT_UPDATE_TIME, TBT_CONTRACT.ID TBT_CONTRACT_ID, TBT_CONTRACT.TRATE_ID TBT_CONTRACT_TRATE_ID, TBT_CONTRACT.CONTRACT_NO TBT_CONTRACT_CONTRACT_NO, TBT_CUSTOMER.ID TBT_CUSTOMER_ID, TBT_CUSTOMER.TRATE_ID TBT_CUSTOMER_TRATE_ID, TBT_CUSTOMER.CUSTOMER_ID TBT_CUSTOMER_CUSTOMER_ID, TBT_CUSTOMER.CUSTOMER_NAME TBT_CUSTOMER_CUSTOMER_NAME, TBTI.ID TBTI_ID, TBTI.TRATE_ID TBTI_TRATE_ID, TBTI.TRADE_TYPE TBTI_TRADE_TYPE, TBTI.IMP_EXP TBTI_IMP_EXP, TBTI.IS_TIERED_RATE TBTI_IS_TIERED_RATE, TBTI.PREFERENTIAL_RATE TBTI_PREFERENTIAL_RATE, TBTI.ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER TBTI_ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER, TBTIC.ID TBTIC_ID, TBTIC.TRATE_ITEM_ID TBTIC_TRATE_ITEM_ID, TBTIC.CARGO_CODE TBTIC_CARGO_CODE, TBTIC.CARGO_NAME TBTIC_CARGO_NAME, TBTID.ID TBTID_ID, TBTID.TRATE_ITEM_ID TBTID_TRATE_ITEM_ID, TBTID.BEGIN_TON TBTID_BEGIN_TON, TBTID.END_TON TBTID_END_TON, TBTID.RATE TBTID_RATE FROM T_BUS_TRATE TBT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_CONTRACT TBT_CONTRACT ON TBT.ID = TBT_CONTRACT.TRATE_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_CUSTOMER TBT_CUSTOMER ON TBT.ID = TBT_CUSTOMER.TRATE_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM TBTI ON TBT.ID = TBTI.TRATE_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_CARGO TBTIC ON TBTI.ID = TBTIC.TRATE_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_DETAIL TBTID ON TBTI.ID = TBTID.TRATE_ITEM_ID WHERE TBT.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT DISTINCT TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM TBTI ON TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID = TBTI.ID WHERE TBCR.TYPE = '10' AND TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = '02' AND TBTI.TRATE_ID = #{trateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_CARGO WHERE TRATE_ITEM_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM WHERE TRATE_ID = #{trateId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
DELETE FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_DETAIL WHERE TRATE_ITEM_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM WHERE TRATE_ID = #{trateId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_TRATE SET START_TIME = #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, END_TIME = #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TRATE_ID, CONTRACT_NO FROM T_BUS_TRATE_CONTRACT WHERE TRATE_ID IN
#{trateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TRATE_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME FROM T_BUS_TRATE_CUSTOMER WHERE TRATE_ID IN
#{trateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TRATE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_CARGO WHERE TRATE_ITEM_ID IN
#{trateItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TRATE_ITEM_ID, BEGIN_TON, END_TON, RATE FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_DETAIL WHERE TRATE_ITEM_ID IN
#{trateItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_TRATE SET STATUS = '20' WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE T_BUS_TRATE SET STATUS = '10' WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
